basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/M.Sc in Food Process Engineering/Food Engineering/Food Technology/Agricultural Processing/Food Science/Food Science and Technology/Food Science and Nutrition/Food Technology and Management/Food Process Engineering and Management/Food Plant Operations and Management/Food Safety and Quality Management/Post Harvest Technology/Food Process Technology/Agricultural Engineering with GATE or NET qualification.
qualification.details: B.Tech/M.Sc in Food Process Engineering/Food Engineering/Food Technology/Agricultural Processing/Food Science/Food Science and Technology/Food Science and Nutrition/Food Technology and Management/Food Process Engineering and Management/Food Plant Operations and Management/Food Safety and Quality Management/Post Harvest Technology/Food Process Technology/Agricultural Engineering. GATE or NET (UGC/CSIR/ICAR) including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) qualified or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA (if campus accommodation is not provided).
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA (if campus accommodation is not provided).

selection_process: Shortlisting of candidates Personal interview (blended mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tezpur University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tezpur University JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.Tech or M.Sc degree in relevant fields such as Food Process Engineering, Food Engineering, Food Technology, or Agricultural Engineering, along with a valid GATE or NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible candidates as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) if campus accommodation is not provided.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by a personal interview, which may be conducted in a blended mode.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with supporting documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Therefore, it is likely that no fee is required.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at Tezpur University.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Tezpur University located?
faq.answer: Tezpur University is located in Tezpur, Assam, with the pincode 784028.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for this project?
faq.answer: The Principal Investigator for this DST-SHRI project is Prof. Brijesh Srivastava. Applications should be sent to his email address.
